title: Cake Chomps
description: Adds sound and crumb particles when you eat cake.
body:
Cake Chomps is a mod that adds eating sounds and crumb particles, like when you're eating every other food item, to cakes. That's it.

## Support

Please report all bugs, issues, and feature requests to the
[issue tracker](https://github.com/illusivesoulworks/cakechomps/issues).

For non-technical support and questions, join the developer's [Discord](https://discord.gg/JWgrdwt).
